section_miscategorizations.text: I will also recommend physical therapy to address any potential muscle weakness or stiffness.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The note contains no mention of muscle weakness or stiffness in the HPI or Findings. Introducing this as a plan item without any corresponding problem or finding is incongruent with the rest of the documentation and suggests an unstated assessment/problem. This could mislead a reader about the patient's actual issues and the clinical reasoning.
